Interface ISimplePixelReader

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a simple pixel reader.

[Guid("6D4BE802-E5D0-4DAD-B022-B58366952794")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISimplePixelReader : IPixelReader
